name: pre-read-strict-unknown-writer-denies
description: Strict-mode deny where the last writer is UNKNOWN: A pre-reads (SHARED), B pre-edits (acquires EXCLUSIVE, invalidating A) but never commits — so no last_writer_id is recorded. A's next pre-read on the strict-tracked artifact denies, and the reason names 'session <unknown>' (the sentinel is preserved verbatim, NOT [:8]-sliced). Guards the <unknown>-writer arm of the deny template on BOTH backends.

hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecisionReason: Stale read denied: CLAUDE.md was updated by session <unknown> at <TS>. Re-read CLAUDE.md via the Read tool before proceeding. This denial is structural (v0.2 strict mode); retrying the same operation will produce the same denial.
